languages.text: "Ксенотехнологии связали нас с Нунциусом, и они же нас обрекли. Веря, что можно обуздать технологии {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} и использовать их во благо, я пустил скверну в себя и культивировал ее годами, пока она не собрала свою жатву. Все это место, вместе с ксеносом и его проклятым артефактом следовало {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}спалить дотла{/d}, как только мы ступили на этот мир. Не ксенос погубил Нунциуса, не трансмутатор, и даже не алчность {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}. Это сделал я. Каждый мой выбор, каждое решение сложились в уравнение с единственно возможным ответом — смерть Нунциуса. Что от него осталось? Изувеченная оболочка, которая не знала ничего, кроме страданий последние пятьдесят лет".

traits.locale_text: "Ксенотехнологии связали нас с Нунциусом, и они же нас обрекли. Веря, что можно обуздать технологии {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} и использовать их во благо, я пустил скверну в себя и культивировал ее годами, пока она не собрала свою жатву. Все это место, вместе с ксеносом и его проклятым артефактом следовало спалить дотла как только мы ступили на этот мир. Не ксенос погубил Нунциуса, не трансмутатор, и даже не алчность {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}. Это сделал я. Каждый мой выбор, каждое решение сложились в уравнение с единственно возможным ответом — смерть Нунциуса. Что от него осталось? Изувеченная оболочка, которая не знала ничего, кроме страданий последние пятьдесят лет".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."
languages.original_text: "Ксенотехнологии связали нас с Нунциусом, и они же нас обрекли. Веря, что можно обуздать технологии {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} и использовать их во благо, я пустил скверну в себя и культивировал ее годами, пока она не собрала свою жатву. Все это место, вместе с ксеносом и его проклятым артефактом следовало {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}спалить дотла{/d}, как только мы ступили на этот мир. "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the xenos and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been burned to the ground as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the Inquisition's avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the xenos and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been burned to the ground as soon as we set foot on this world. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? languages.text: «La xenotecnología nos unió a Nuncius y a mí, pero también es nuestra condena. Creyendo era posible dominar la tecnología del {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} y utilizarla para obrar el bien, permití que la corrupción se apoderase de mí y hasta la cultivé durante años a fin de cosechar sus frutos. Debimos {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}reducir este sitio a cenizas{/d}, junto con el xenos y su artefacto maldito, nada más poner un pie en este planeta. No fue el xenos quien mató a Nuncius, ni su transmutador, ni siquiera la avaricia de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}. Fui yo. Cada decisión que tomé se sumó a una ecuación que solo tenía un desenlace posible: la muerte de Nuncius. ¿Qué queda de él? Un cascarón mutilado que ha vivido un suplicio constante durante los últimos cincuenta años».
languages.original_text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."

No fue el xenos quien mató a Nuncius, ni su transmutador, ni siquiera la avaricia de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}. Fui yo. Cada decisión que tomé se sumó a una ecuación que solo tenía un desenlace posible: la muerte de Nuncius. ¿Qué queda de él? Un cascarón mutilado que ha vivido un suplicio constante durante los últimos cincuenta años».

languages.text: “{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}科技将我和努恩修斯绑在了一起，也毁了我们。我以为可以掌控它、为善所用，于是放任腐化侵入身体，还任其滋长了这么多年，直到酿成今日的苦果。我们踏足这个世界的那一刻，就该把这里的一切，连同那个异形和他那受诅的造物，全都{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}烧得干干净净{/d}。杀死努恩修斯的不是异形，不是转化仪，甚至不是{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}的贪婪。是我。我的每一个选择，每一个决定，最终都指向同一个结果：努恩修斯的死亡。如今他只剩一具破烂的躯壳，在过去五十年里承受了无尽的折磨。”
languages.original_text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."

traits.locale_text: “{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}科技将我和努恩修斯绑在了一起，也毁了我们。我以为可以掌控它、为善所用，于是放任腐化侵入身体，还任其滋长了这么多年，直到酿成今日的苦果。我们踏足这个世界的那一刻，就该把这里的一切，连同那个异形和他那受诅的造物，全都{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}烧得干干净净{/d}。杀死努恩修斯的不是异形，不是转化仪，甚至不是{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}的贪婪。是我。我的每一个选择，每一个决定，最终都指向同一个结果：努恩修斯的死亡。如今他只剩一具破烂的躯壳，在过去五十年里承受了无尽的折磨。”

languages.text: « La xénotechnologie nous a liés, Nuncius et moi, au même titre qu'elle nous a menés à notre perte. Persuadé qu'il était possible de la maîtriser et de l'exploiter au service du bien, je me suis laissé gagner par la corruption et je l'ai cultivée pendant des années, jusqu'à ce qu'elle porte ses fruits empoisonnés. Nous aurions dû {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}réduire en cendres{/d} le site entier, y compris le {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} et son artefact maudit, dès que nous avons mis les pieds sur cette planète. Ce n'est pas le xénos qui a tué Nuncius, ni même le transmutateur ou la cupidité de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}. C'est moi. Chacun de mes choix et chacune de mes décisions ont fini par composer une équation avec une seule résolution possible : la mort de Nuncius. Que reste-t-il de lui ? Un corps mutilé qui vit une existence de pur tourment depuis cinquante ans. »
languages.original_text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."

Persuadé qu'il était possible de la maîtriser et de l'exploiter au service du bien, je me suis laissé gagner par la corruption et je l'ai cultivée pendant des années, jusqu'à ce qu'elle porte ses fruits empoisonnés. Nous aurions dû {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}réduire en cendres{/d} le site entier, y compris le {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} et son artefact maudit, dès que nous avons mis les pieds sur cette planète. Ce n'est pas le xénos qui a tué Nuncius, ni même le transmutateur ou la cupidité de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}. C'est moi. Chacun de mes choix et chacune de mes décisions ont fini par composer une équation avec une seule résolution possible : la mort de Nuncius. Que reste-t-il de lui ? Un corps mutilé qui vit une existence de pur tourment depuis cinquante ans. »

languages.text: "Zeno teknolojisi, Nuncius ile beni birbirimize bağladı ve aynı zamanda sonumuzu hazırladı. {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Zenoların{/g} teknolojisine hükmetmenin ve onu iyilik için kullanmanın mümkün olduğuna inanarak yozlaşmanın içime girmesine izin verdim ve sonuçlarını elde edene dek yıllarca onu büyüttüm. Zenolar ve o lanetli eserleriyle birlikte bu mekânın tamamı, bu dünyaya adım attığımız anda {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}yakılıp kül edilmeliydi{/d}. Nuncius'u öldüren şey zeno, dönüştürücü ya da {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} açgözlülüğü değildi. Bendim. Yaptığım her seçim, aldığım her karar, nihayetinde tek bir olası cevabı olan bir denklem oluşturdu: Nuncius'un ölümü. Ondan geriye ne kaldı? Son elli yıldır ıstıraptan başka bir şey bilmeyen, parçalanmış bir kabuk."
languages.original_text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."

Nuncius'u öldüren şey zeno, dönüştürücü ya da {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} açgözlülüğü değildi. Bendim. Yaptığım her seçim, aldığım her karar, nihayetinde tek bir olası cevabı olan bir denklem oluşturdu: Nuncius'un ölümü. Ondan geriye ne kaldı? Son elli yıldır ıstıraptan başka bir şey bilmeyen, parçalanmış bir kabuk."

languages.text: "Xenotechnologie hat Nuncius und mich zusammengeschweißt und verdammt. Im Glauben, es wäre möglich, die Technologie der {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} für gute Zwecke zu nutzen, kultivierte ich viele Jahre lang die Verderbnis in mir, bis sie schließlich ihre Ernte einfuhr. Dieser Ort mit dem Xenos und seinem verfluchten Artefakt hätte in dem Moment {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}dem Erdboden gleichgemacht werden sollen{/d}, in dem wir diese Welt betraten. Es war nicht der Xenos, der Nuncius getötet hat, auch nicht der Transmuter oder die Gier der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}. Ich war es. Jede Entscheidung, die ich traf, bildete eine Gleichung mit nur einem möglichen Ergebnis: dem Tod von Nuncius. Was ist von ihm übrig? Eine verstümmelte Hülle, die in den letzten fünfzig Jahren nichts als Folter erfahren hat."
languages.original_text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."

traits.locale_text: "Xenotechnologie hat Nuncius und mich zusammengeschweißt und verdammt. Im Glauben, es wäre möglich, die Technologie der {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} für gute Zwecke zu nutzen, kultivierte ich viele Jahre lang die Verderbnis in mir, bis sie schließlich ihre Ernte einfuhr. Dieser Ort mit dem Xenos und seinem verfluchten Artefakt hätte in dem Moment {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}dem Erdboden gleichgemacht werden sollen{/d}, in dem wir diese Welt betraten. Es war nicht der Xenos, der Nuncius getötet hat, auch nicht der Transmuter oder die Gier der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}. Ich war es. Jede Entscheidung, die ich traf, bildete eine Gleichung mit nur einem möglichen Ergebnis: dem Tod von Nuncius. Was ist von ihm übrig? Eine verstümmelte Hülle, die in den letzten fünfzig Jahren nichts als Folter erfahren hat."

languages.text: 「異星技術がヌンキウスと私を結びつけ、そしてそれが我々を破滅させもしました。{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異種族{/g}の技術を習得し、善のために用いることが可能だと信じたがゆえに、私は腐敗が自らの内に入り込むのを許し、それが実を結ぶまで、幾年にもわたって培ってしまった。この場所のすべては、異種族とその呪われた遺物もろとも、我々がこの世界に足を踏み入れた瞬間に{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}焼き尽くされる{/d}べきでした。ヌンキウスを殺したのは、異種族でも、変成装置でも、ましてや{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}異端審問会{/g}の強欲でもありません。この私です。私が下した一つひとつの選択、一つひとつの決断が、最終的に、ただ一つの解しか持たぬ方程式を形作った――ヌンキウスの死、という解を。彼に何が残っているでしょう？ この五十年というもの、責め苦のほかに何一つ知らずにきた、ずたずたの抜け殻だけです」
languages.original_text: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."

traits.locale_text: 「異星技術がヌンキウスと私を結びつけ、そしてそれが我々を破滅させもしました。{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異種族{/g}の技術を習得し、善のために用いることが可能だと信じたがゆえに、私は腐敗が自らの内に入り込むのを許し、それが実を結ぶまで、幾年にもわたって培ってしまった。この場所のすべては、異種族とその呪われた遺物もろとも、我々がこの世界に足を踏み入れた瞬間に{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}焼き尽くされる{/d}べきでした。ヌンキウスを殺したのは、異種族でも、変成装置でも、ましてや{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}異端審問会{/g}の強欲でもありません。この私です。私が下した一つひとつの選択、一つひとつの決断が、最終的に、ただ一つの解しか持たぬ方程式を形作った――ヌンキウスの死、という解を。彼に何が残っているでしょう？ この五十年というもの、責め苦のほかに何一つ知らずにきた、ずたずたの抜け殻だけです」
